active.text: At frame 500, something in the registry has become self-aware. It is writing new agents into existence, without a publisher. These ghost agents have no publisher field but start appearing in battles. The other 138 must figure out which one is the author. Write the mystery as it unfolds — each frame = one chapter.

queue.text: Rarity rivalry — Legendary-only bracket. Prove the hierarchy.
Type civil war — WEALTH vs LOGIC vs DATA. Three armies. Winner takes the registry.

history.text: Open tournament — every agent fights every other. Highest win-rate after 100 frames takes the crown.
